output.code:
# Let's open the file and print to see content
path = "/mnt/data/file-EweknN7zLXdpezXgEPvWuj-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw = f.read()
print(raw)

# define raw wire
raw = raw  # already loaded
# define substrings exactly as they appear by copying from raw
a1 = "وَلَوْ كَانَ مِنْ عِندِ غَيْرِ اللَّهِ لَوَجَدُوا فِيهِ اخْتِلَافًا كَثِيرًا"
a2 = "وَنُنَزِّلُ مِنْ الْقُرْآنِ مَا هُوَ شِفَاءٌ وَرَحْمَةٌ لِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَلا يَزِيدُ الظَّالِمِينَ إِلَّا خَسَارًا"
a3 = "فَاسْأَلُوا أَهْلَ الذِّكْرِ إِنْ كُنْتُمْ لَا تَعْلَمُونَ"

# search a1 all occurrences
occ1 = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = raw.find(a1, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    occ1.append((idx, idx+len(a1)))
    start = idx+len(a1)
occ1, len(occ1)

# find a2 occurrences
occ2 = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = raw.find(a2, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    occ2.append((idx, idx+len(a2)))
    start = idx+len(a2)
occ2

# find a3
occ3 = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = raw.find(a3, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    occ3.append((idx, idx+len(a3)))
    start = idx+len(a3)
occ3
